## 🔐 Security Checklist

| 🧠 STRIDE Analysis | 🔒 Security & Risk Checks |
|-------------------|--------------------------|
| - [ ] **Spoofing considered**<br>_Could someone pretend to be another user or system?_<br><br>- [ ] **Tampering considered**<br>_Can someone modify data they shouldn’t?_<br><br>- [ ] **Repudiation considered**<br>_Can a user deny they performed an action?_<br><br>- [ ] **Information Disclosure considered**<br>_Could sensitive data leak?_<br><br>- [ ] **Denial of Service considered**<br>_Can someone overload or break the system?_<br><br>- [ ] **Elevation of Privilege considered**<br>_Can a user gain more access than they should?_ | ### 📊 Risk Assessment<br>- [ ] This change is **small / low risk**<br>- [ ] This change is **significant and requires risk assessment**<br><br>### 🔒 General Security Checks<br>- [ ] **No secrets added**<br>  - No API keys, passwords, tokens in code or config<br>- [ ] **Dependencies reviewed**<br>  - New npm / NuGet packages checked for known vulnerabilities<br>- [ ] **Input validation done**<br>  - All API inputs validated server-side (never trust React frontend)<br>- [ ] **Error handling safe**<br>  - No sensitive info in error messages<br><br>### ✅ (Optional but recommended)<br>- [ ] Logging added for critical actions<br>- [ ] Authorization checked on backend<br>- [ ] Endpoints tested with invalid / malicious input |
